steps.title: Find each allowed range
steps.content:
For each listed $x$-value, a solution must satisfy both inequalities.
$$
-3x-12<y<-5x-19
$$
At $x=-5$:
$$
3<y<6
$$
At $x=-6$:
$$
6<y<11
$$
At $x=-8$:
$$
12<y<21
$$

steps.title: Compare the table values
steps.content: The table with $y$-values $4$, $10$, and $19$ fits all three ranges. $$ 3<4<6 $$ $$ 6<10<11 $$ $$ 12<19<21 $$ The answer is B.
